title: Drum Kingdom Is Named
description: On pages 13–16, drum kingdom is named as the crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom.
scene: Drum Kingdom Is Named. The crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You even have an anchor rope for me!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you dare move! His Highness is in the middle of his meal!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: should've done this from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So can I beat their asses now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: W-Wait! I'm sure we can talk this out!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Karoo! Keep a close eye on Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hmph, all talk and nothing to show for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahhhh! Still trying to eat our ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha! That idiot thinks he can fight his, majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He'll be eaten alive by the power of the "Baku Baku Fruit."
